qa_pairs.question: Which buildings have at least 22 floors but are no more than 280 feet tall?

qa_pairs.canonical_question: Which building entities with height feet at least '579' and name equal to '100 North Tampa' and street address equal to '100 North Tampa Street', having at least one related institution record (linked on building.building_id = institution.building_id) with type equal to 'Private' and institution equal to 'Point University'?

qa_pairs.question: Which buildings named Tampa City Hall have at least 10 floors and are associated with institutions founded in 1881 or earlier where the team is Trojans and the primary conference is none?
qa_pairs.sql:
SELECT building.building_id FROM building
JOIN institution ON building.building_id = institution.building_id
WHERE institution.founded <= 1881.0 AND institution.team = 'Trojans' AND building.floors >= 10 AND building.name = 'Tampa City Hall' AND institution.primary_conference = 'none'
qa_pairs.canonical_question: Which building entities with floors at least '10' and name equal to 'Tampa City Hall', having at least one related institution record (linked on building.building_id = institution.building_id) with founded at most '1881.0' and team equal to 'Trojans' and primary conference equal to 'none'?
